---
title: "Research"
---

# Publications

- [“Incentives to Join Opposition Parties in Autocracies: The Case of the Communist Party of the Russian Federation.” *Demokratizatsiya: The Journal of Post-Soviet Democratization* ](https://muse.jhu.edu/article/953963)

# Working Papers

# Book Reviews

- [Eternal Putin? Confronting Navalny, the Pandemic, Sanctions, and War with Ukraine: J. L. Black, Lanham, MD & London: Lexington Books, 2023. *Europe-Asia Studies*](https://doi.org/10.1080/09668136.2025.2517994)

- [Russian Politics Today. Stability and Fragility: Susanne A. Wengle (ed.), Cambridge & New York, NY: Cambridge University Press, 2023. *Europe-Asia Studies*](https://doi-org/10.1080/09668136.2024.2437319)

- [Party Politics in Russia and Ukraine. Electoral System Change in Diverging Regimes: Byron Moraski, New York, NY: New York University Press, 2022. *Europe-Asia Studies*](https://doi-org/10.1080/09668136.2023.2205324)
